title: Feature record (Stage 2.5 enrich): additive, standoff, non-gating instrumentation
description: Produced at Stage 2.5 (enrich), AFTER candidates. A feature record is a calibrated, role-tagged signal that REFERENCES a parent unit/candidate by id and never mutates it. Standoff: records live in a separate feature_records.jsonl; enrich must leave units.jsonl/annotations.jsonl/candidate_case_files.jsonl byte-identical (enforced by the additive-invariant test). Non-gating by construction: this envelope carries NO routing/evidence_ready/ranking field, so a feature cannot change what is routed or judged. Role tag is the load-bearing interpretation label (D2); signal_basis is the secondary tag (renamed from the plan's 'authority_level' to avoid collision with the pipeline's existing authority_level field). Lifecycle state is NOT here — it lives per-feature in features/feature_registry.csv (this is per unit×feature).

feature_record_id.description: Content-addressed via ids.py from (unit_ref, method.name, method.version). Never hand-constructed.

unit_ref.description: Parent unit this feature describes. Standoff reference — the unit is never modified.

candidate_ref.description: Optional. Present only when scope=candidate (the feature is surfaced in this candidate's Stage-4 pack).

scope.description: What span the signal describes: a unit (sentence) or a candidate case file.

name.description: Feature name; join key to features/feature_registry.csv. e.g. surface_complexity_profile.

version.description: Semantic version of the feature/lexicon, e.g. 1.0.0. Cue lexicons bump this on any term change.

role.description: Load-bearing interpretation label (D2): measurement = a count/measure; cue = a marker that suggests a discourse move; warning = a flag that the unit may be hard to interpret in isolation.

signal_basis.description: Secondary tag (D2; named 'authority_level' in the plan, renamed to avoid collision): deterministic_surface = computed from surface text/lexicon, reproducible; statistical_candidate = derived from a model/corpus estimate (deferred; none in the proof slice).

presentation.description: How this record may surface: stored_only = observational, never in a pack; pack_visible_when_triggered = enters the Stage-4 pack only if triggered=true; always_visible = always in the pack. Governs 'store generously, present sparingly'.

triggered.description: Did the signal actually fire? Measurement features set true when a value was computed. cue/warning features set true only on a real hit — gates pack_visible_when_triggered.

payload.description: Feature-specific values + false-positive metadata. Open object (the only un-fixed field). Shape is defined per-feature in feature_interpretation_guide.md, not here.
